issues_found: Source is a listing page (source_type: listing_page), which violates Core Rule 5 - reject container/listing pages
URL field is blank - no valid source attribution
event_type is 'unknown' - listing pages do not have a specific event type
Source has no direct macro catalyst relevance as documented in the record itself
Individual press releases (FSOC readout, international capital data) would need to be accessed separately as standalone documents
Record correctly acknowledges the source is non-archiveable as-is
human_review_reason: This is a clear-cut rejection. The source is a listing/collection page, not an individual archiveable document. Core Rule 5 explicitly states to reject listing pages. The record itself accurately identifies this limitation and appropriately suggests individual press releases should be assessed separately.
